controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to an nbfc-aa, despite their categorization as nbfcs-bl under the sbr framework
controls.control_description:
Chapter-I Preliminary
Note: The above-mentioned Paragraphs 12, 13, 17(1) and 18 shall be
applicable to an NBFC-AA, despite their categorization as NBFCs-BL
under the SBR Framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be applicable to an nbfc-aa, despite their categorization as nbfcs-bl under the sbr framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to an nbfc-p2p registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(7) The provisions of Paragraphs 8 to 13 shall apply to an NBFC-P2P
registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to an nbfc-p2p registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to an nbfc-p2p, despite their categorization as nbfcs-bl under the sbr framework
controls.control_description:
Note: The above- mentioned paragraphs 12 and 13 shall be applicable to
an NBFC-P2P, despite their categorization as NBFCs-BL under the SBR
Framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be applicable to an nbfc-p2p, despite their categorization as nbfcs-bl under the sbr framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an 'nbfc')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to the following Non-Banking Financial
Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as an
'NBFC'), subject to Layer-wise applicability specified in sub-paragraph (1) below:
(1) NBFCs classified under the Base Layer (NBFCs-BL) shall comply with the
provisions of Chapter III, those under the Middle Layer (NBFCs-ML) shall
comply with Chapters II, III and IV, while those under the Upper Layer
(NBFCs-UL) shall be governed by the provisions of Chapters II, III, IV, and
V, unless stated otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an 'nbfc')

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to government owned nbfcs
controls.control_description:
Provided that,
the provisions pertaining to 'Compensation of KMP and Senior
Management' as set out in paragraphs 29 to 37 of these Directions shall
not apply to Government owned NBFCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to government owned nbfcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the following
controls.control_description:
(2) The provisions of Paragraph 7 to 43 herein shall apply to the following,
subject to Layer-wise applicability as mentioned in sub-paragraph (1)
above:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the following

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to a cic registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(3) The provisions of Paragraphs 7 to 15, 18 to 39, and 41 to 43 shall apply to
a CIC registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to a cic registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to an mgc registered with the rbi under the scheme of registration of mortgage guarantee companies
controls.control_description:
(4) The provisions of Paragraphs 7(2), 7(3), 8, 9, 16 to 18, 25 to 39, and 41 to
43 shall apply to an MGC registered with the RBI under the scheme of
Registration of Mortgage Guarantee Companies, subject to Layer-wise
applicability as mentioned in sub-paragraph (1) above;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to an mgc registered with the rbi under the scheme of registration of mortgage guarantee companies

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to an spd registered with the rbi as an nbfc under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to an spd registered with the rbi as an nbfc under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to an nbfc-aa registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(6) The provisions of Paragraphs 8, 10 to 13, 17(1) and 18 shall apply to an
NBFC-AA registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to an nbfc-aa registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'clawback' means a contractual agreement between the employee and the regulated entity in which the empl
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Clawback' means a contractual agreement between the employee and
the regulated entity in which the employee agrees to return previously
paid or vested remuneration to the entity under certain circumstances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'clawback' means a contractual agreement between the employee and the regulated entity in which the empl

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company registered under section 3 of the companies act, 1956 or the corresponding provision under the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Company' means a company registered under Section 3 of the
Companies Act, 1956 or the corresponding provision under the
Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company registered under section 3 of the companies act, 1956 or the corresponding provision under the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure a director appointed on the board of an nbfc
controls.control_description: (3) 'Director' means a director appointed on the Board of an NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a director appointed on the board of an nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as defined in section 149(6) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Independent Director' shall be as defined in Section 149(6) of the
Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as defined in section 149(6) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned to it under clause 51 of section 2 of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(5) 'Key Managerial Personnel' shall have the meaning assigned to it under
clause 51 of Section 2 of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned to it under clause 51 of section 2 of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure an arrangement that permits an nbfc to prevent vesting of all or part of the amount of a deferred remuneration
controls.control_description:
(6) 'Malus' means an arrangement that permits an NBFC to prevent vesting
of all or part of the amount of a deferred remuneration.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an arrangement that permits an nbfc to prevent vesting of all or part of the amount of a deferred remuneration

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned to it under clause 77 of section 2 of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(7) 'Relative' shall have the meaning assigned to it under clause 77 of Section
2 of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned to it under clause 77 of section 2 of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure the period after the vesting of instruments which have been awarded as variable pay during which they cannot be sold or accessed
controls.control_description:
(8) 'Retention period' means the period after the vesting of instruments which
have been awarded as variable pay during which they cannot be sold or
accessed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the period after the vesting of instruments which have been awarded as variable pay during which they cannot be sold or accessed

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning as assigned to it in 'explanation' to section 178 of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(9) 'Senior Management' shall have the meaning as assigned to it in
'Explanation' to Section 178 of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning as assigned to it in 'explanation' to section 178 of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean holding of a beneficial interest by an individual or his spouse or minor child, whether singly or taken together in the shares of a company, the
controls.control_description:
(10) 'Substantial interest' shall mean holding of a beneficial interest by an
individual or his spouse or minor child, whether singly or taken together
in the shares of a company, the amount paid up on which exceeds ten per
<image>
cent of the paid-up capital of the company;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean holding of a beneficial interest by an individual or his spouse or minor child, whether singly or taken together in the shares of a company, the

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the companies act, 2013 and rules made thereunder, or
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the
Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made thereunder, or any statutory modification
or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by RBI or as used in
common or commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the companies act, 2013 and rules made thereunder, or

controls.control_objective: To ensure have board approved policies in place for the following: (1) a policy for ascertaining the 'fit and proper' status of the directors at the time of app
controls.control_description:
An NBFC falling under the Middle Layer or Upper Layer shall have Board
approved policies in place for the following:
(1) a policy for ascertaining the 'fit and proper' status of the directors at the
time of appointment, and on a continuing basis, as detailed in paragraph
12 of these Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have board approved policies in place for the following: (1) a policy for ascertaining the 'fit and proper' status of the directors at the time of app

controls.control_objective: To ensure have relevant experience of having worked in a bank or an nbfc
controls.control_description:
At least one of the directors of an NBFC shall have relevant experience of having
worked in a bank or an NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have relevant experience of having worked in a bank or an nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a risk management committee (rmc) either at the board or executive level
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall constitute a Risk Management Committee (RMC) either at the
Board or executive level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a risk management committee (rmc) either at the board or executive level

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for evaluating the overall risks faced by the nbfc including liquidity risk and shall report to the board
controls.control_description:
The RMC shall be responsible for evaluating the overall
risks faced by the NBFC including liquidity risk and shall report to the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be responsible for evaluating the overall risks faced by the nbfc including liquidity risk and shall report to the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain prior written permission of rbi for any change in the management of the nbfc, which would result in change in more than 30 percent of the direc
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall obtain prior written permission of RBI for any change in the
management of the NBFC, which would result in change in more than 30 percent
of the directors, excluding independent directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain prior written permission of rbi for any change in the management of the nbfc, which would result in change in more than 30 percent of the direc

controls.control_objective: To ensure , prior approval would not be required in case of directors who get re-elected on retirement by rotation
controls.control_description:
Provided that,
prior approval would not be required in case of directors who get re-elected on
retirement by rotation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , prior approval would not be required in case of directors who get re-elected on retirement by rotation

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to inform rbi (nhb in case of hfcs) regarding any change in their directors / management
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Notwithstanding the provision contained in paragraph 10 above,
NBFCs shall continue to inform RBI (NHB in case of HFCs) regarding any change
in their directors / management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to inform rbi (nhb in case of hfcs) regarding any change in their directors / management

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit an application for change in management as indicated in paragraph 10 of these directions, on the company's letter head, for obtaining prior app
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall submit an application for change in management as indicated in
paragraph 10 of these Directions, on the company's letter head, for obtaining prior
approval of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit an application for change in management as indicated in paragraph 10 of these directions, on the company's letter head, for obtaining prior app

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to rbi through pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
Applications in this regard shall be submitted to RBI through
PRAVAAH portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) along with the documents (including
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to rbi through pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a policy with the approval of its board of directors for ascertaining the 'fit and proper' status of the directors at the time of appoint
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall put in place a policy with the approval of its Board of Directors for
ascertaining the 'fit and proper' status of the directors at the time of appointment,
and on a continuing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a policy with the approval of its board of directors for ascertaining the 'fit and proper' status of the directors at the time of appoint

controls.control_objective: To ensure institute an internal process to conduct due diligence of directors on a continuing basis
controls.control_description:
Further, an NBFC shall institute an internal process to
conduct due diligence of directors on a continuing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to institute an internal process to conduct due diligence of directors on a continuing basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure , rbi reserves the right to examine the 'fit and proper' status of directors of an nbfc irrespective of its asset size
controls.control_description:
Provided that, RBI reserves the right to examine the 'fit and proper' status of
directors of an NBFC irrespective of its asset size, if it so deems fit in public
interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , rbi reserves the right to examine the 'fit and proper' status of directors of an nbfc irrespective of its asset size

controls.control_objective: To ensure : (1) undertake a process of due diligence to determine the suitability of a person for appointment / renewal of appointment as a director on the boar
controls.control_description:
To streamline and bring in uniformity in the process of due diligence, an NBFC
shall:
(1) undertake a process of due diligence to determine the suitability of a person
for appointment / renewal of appointment as a director on the Board, based
upon qualification, technical expertise, track record, integrity and other 'fit
and proper' criteria.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : (1) undertake a process of due diligence to determine the suitability of a person for appointment / renewal of appointment as a director on the boar

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain necessary information and declaration from the proposed / existing directors in the format given at annex ii
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain necessary information and declaration from the proposed / existing directors in the format given at annex ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide on the acceptance or otherwise of the directors
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide on the acceptance or otherwise of the directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish to rbi (nhb in case of hfcs), on a quarterly basis, a statement on change of directors, and a certificate from its managing director / <image>
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall furnish to RBI (NHB in case of HFCs), on a quarterly basis, a
statement on change of directors, and a certificate from its Managing Director /
<image>
CEO that 'fit and proper criteria' in selection of the directors has been followed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish to rbi (nhb in case of hfcs), on a quarterly basis, a statement on change of directors, and a certificate from its managing director / <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that: (1) the statement reaches the regional office of the department of supervision of rbi (nhb in case of hfcs) where the company is regi
controls.control_description:
In
this regard, it shall be ensured that:
(1) the statement reaches the Regional Office of the Department of
Supervision of RBI (NHB in case of HFCs) where the company is
registered, within 15 days of the close of the respective quarter;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that: (1) the statement reaches the regional office of the department of supervision of rbi (nhb in case of hfcs) where the company is regi

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit to its board of directors at periodic intervals, as may be prescribed by the board in this regard, the following: (1) progress made in putting
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall submit to its Board of Directors at periodic intervals, as may be
prescribed by the Board in this regard, the following:
(1) progress made in putting in place a progressive risk management system
and risk management policy and strategy followed by the NBFC;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit to its board of directors at periodic intervals, as may be prescribed by the board in this regard, the following: (1) progress made in putting

controls.control_objective: To ensure delineate the role of various committees
controls.control_description:
The Board of Directors of an NBFC should delineate the role of various
committees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to delineate the role of various committees

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute an audit committee, consisting of not less than three members of its board of directors
controls.control_description:
Audit Committee
(1) An NBFC shall constitute an Audit Committee, consisting of not less than
three members of its Board of Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute an audit committee, consisting of not less than three members of its board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as the audit committee for the purpose of this paragraph
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as the audit committee for the purpose of this paragraph

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same powers, functions and duties as laid down in section 177 of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(ii) the Audit Committee constituted under this paragraph shall have the same
powers, functions and duties as laid down in Section 177 of the Companies
Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same powers, functions and duties as laid down in section 177 of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an information system audit of the internal systems and processes is conducted as per the periodicity prescribed in reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
(2) The Audit Committee of an NBFC shall ensure that an Information System
Audit of the internal systems and processes is conducted as per the
periodicity prescribed in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
<image>
Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as
amended from time to time, to assess operational risks faced by the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an information system audit of the internal systems and processes is conducted as per the periodicity prescribed in reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure form a nomination and remuneration committee (nrc) which shall have the constitution, powers, functions and duties as laid down in section 178 of the
controls.control_description:
Nomination and Remuneration Committee
(1) An NBFC shall form a Nomination and Remuneration Committee (NRC)
which shall have the constitution, powers, functions and duties as laid down
in Section 178 of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form a nomination and remuneration committee (nrc) which shall have the constitution, powers, functions and duties as laid down in section 178 of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as the nrc / nomination committee for the purpose of this paragraph
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as the nrc / nomination committee for the purpose of this paragraph

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in lieu of the requirement under this paragraph, form a nomination committee to ensure 'fit and proper' status of proposed and existing directors, a
controls.control_description:
(ii) a Government-owned NBFC shall, in lieu of the requirement under this
paragraph, form a Nomination Committee to ensure 'fit and proper' status
of proposed and existing directors, and such Committee shall have the
same powers, functions and duties as laid down in Section 178 of the
Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in lieu of the requirement under this paragraph, form a nomination committee to ensure 'fit and proper' status of proposed and existing directors, a

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint a chief risk officer (cro) with clearly specified role and responsibilities
controls.control_description:
An NBFC with an asset size of more than ₹5,000 crore shall appoint a Chief Risk
Officer (CRO) with clearly specified role and responsibilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint a chief risk officer (cro) with clearly specified role and responsibilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a senior official in the hierarchy of an nbfc and shall possess adequate professional qualification / experience in risk management
controls.control_description:
The CRO shall be a senior official in the hierarchy of an NBFC and shall possess
adequate professional qualification / experience in risk management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a senior official in the hierarchy of an nbfc and shall possess adequate professional qualification / experience in risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure function independently to ensure highest standards of risk management and the board shall put in place policies to safeguard such independence
controls.control_description:
The CRO of an NBFC shall function independently to ensure highest standards
of risk management and the Board shall put in place policies to safeguard such
independence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to function independently to ensure highest standards of risk management and the board shall put in place policies to safeguard such independence

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that: (1) the cro shall have direct reporting lines to the md&ceo / risk management committee of the board (rmcb)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that: (1) the cro shall have direct reporting lines to the md&ceo / risk management committee of the board (rmcb)

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the cro without the presence of the md&ceo, at least on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
(2) in case the CRO reports to the MD&CEO, the RMC / Board shall meet the
CRO without the presence of the MD&CEO, at least on a quarterly basis;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet the cro without the presence of the md&ceo, at least on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any reporting relationship with the business verticals and shall not be given any business targets
controls.control_description:
(3) the CRO shall not have any reporting relationship with the business
verticals and shall not be given any business targets;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any reporting relationship with the business verticals and shall not be given any business targets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be any 'dual hatting' i
controls.control_description:
and
(4) there shall not be any 'dual hatting' i.e., the CRO shall not be given any
other responsibility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be any 'dual hatting' i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appointed for a fixed tenure with the approval of the board and may be transferred / removed from their post before completion of the tenure only w
controls.control_description:
The CRO of an NBFC shall be appointed for a fixed tenure with the approval of
the Board and may be transferred / removed from their post before completion of
the tenure only with the approval of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appointed for a fixed tenure with the approval of the board and may be transferred / removed from their post before completion of the tenure only w

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the department of supervision of the regional office of rbi (nhb in case of hfcs) under whose jurisdiction the nbfc is registered
controls.control_description:
Such premature transfer / removal
shall be reported to the Department of Supervision of the Regional Office of RBI
(NHB in case of HFCs) under whose jurisdiction the NBFC is registered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the department of supervision of the regional office of rbi (nhb in case of hfcs) under whose jurisdiction the nbfc is registered

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reported to the stock exchanges
controls.control_description:
In case
the NBFC is listed, any change in incumbency of the CRO shall also be reported
to the stock exchanges.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reported to the stock exchanges

controls.control_objective: To ensure be involved in the process of identification, measurement and mitigation of risks
controls.control_description:
The CRO of an NBFC shall be involved in the process of identification,
measurement and mitigation of risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be involved in the process of identification, measurement and mitigation of risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be vetted by its cro from the angle of inherent and control risks
controls.control_description:
All credit products (retail or wholesale) of an
NBFC shall be vetted by its CRO from the angle of inherent and control risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be vetted by its cro from the angle of inherent and control risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to being an advisor
controls.control_description:
The
CRO's role in deciding credit proposals shall be limited to being an advisor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to being an advisor

controls.control_objective: To ensure have voting power and all members who are part of the credit sanction process, shall individually and severally be liable for all the aspects, includi
controls.control_description:
In an NBFC that follows committee approach in credit sanction process for high
value proposals, if the CRO is one of the decision makers in the credit sanction
process, the CRO shall have voting power and all members who are part of the
credit sanction process, shall individually and severally be liable for all the
aspects, including risk perspective related to the credit proposal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have voting power and all members who are part of the credit sanction process, shall individually and severally be liable for all the aspects, includi

controls.control_objective: To ensure , (1) appoint a chief compliance officer (cco), who should be sufficiently senior in the organization hierarchy
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , (1) appoint a chief compliance officer (cco), who should be sufficiently senior in the organization hierarchy

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold any office (including directorships) in any other nbfc-ml or nbfc-ul
controls.control_description:
Except for directorship in a subsidiary, Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) of an
NBFC shall not hold any office (including directorships) in any other NBFC-ML or
NBFC-UL.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold any office (including directorships) in any other nbfc-ml or nbfc-ul

controls.control_objective: To ensure assume directorship in nbfcs-bl
controls.control_description: Explanation: Such KMP may assume directorship in NBFCs-BL.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assume directorship in nbfcs-bl

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on the board of more than three nbfcs (nbfcs-ml or nbfcs-ul) at the same time
controls.control_description:
Within the permissible limits in terms of Companies Act, 2013, an independent
director shall not be on the Board of more than three NBFCs (NBFCs-ML or
NBFCs-UL) at the same time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on the board of more than three nbfcs (nbfcs-ml or nbfcs-ul) at the same time

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply in respect of directorships held in nbfcs-bl
controls.control_description:
This restriction shall not apply in respect of
directorships held in NBFCs-BL, subject to compliance with the applicable
provisions of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply in respect of directorships held in nbfcs-bl

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that there is no conflict arising out of its independent director/s being on the board of another nbfc at the same time
controls.control_description:
The Board of an NBFC shall ensure that there is no conflict arising out of its
independent director/s being on the Board of another NBFC at the same time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that there is no conflict arising out of its independent director/s being on the board of another nbfc at the same time

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place and adhere to a board-approved compensation policy to address issues arising out of excessive risk taking caused by misaligned compensati
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall put in place and adhere to a Board-approved compensation policy
to address issues arising out of excessive risk taking caused by misaligned
compensation packages.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place and adhere to a board-approved compensation policy to address issues arising out of excessive risk taking caused by misaligned compensati

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at the minimum, include: (1) principles for fixed / variable pay structures
controls.control_description:
The policy shall, at the minimum, include:
(1) principles for fixed / variable pay structures;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at the minimum, include: (1) principles for fixed / variable pay structures

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, also have the mandate to oversee the framing, review and implementation of its board-approved compensation policy
controls.control_description:
The NRC of an NBFC, constituted in accordance with the provisions of paragraph
18 of these Directions, shall, inter alia, also have the mandate to oversee the
framing, review and implementation of its Board-approved compensation policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , inter alia, also have the mandate to oversee the framing, review and implementation of its board-approved compensation policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure : (1) work in close coordination with the rmc to achieve effective alignment between compensation and risks
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : (1) work in close coordination with the rmc to achieve effective alignment between compensation and risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise fixed and variable pay components aligned effectively with prudent risk taking to ensure that compensation is adjusted for all types of risks
controls.control_description:
The compensation packages may comprise fixed and variable pay
components aligned effectively with prudent risk taking to ensure that
compensation is adjusted for all types of risks, the compensation outcomes are
symmetric with risk outcomes, compensation pay-outs are sensitive to the time
horizon of the risks, and the mix of cash, equity and other forms of compensation
are consistent with risk alignment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise fixed and variable pay components aligned effectively with prudent risk taking to ensure that compensation is adjusted for all types of risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure treat all the fixed items of compensation, including the perquisites and contributions towards superannuation / retiral benefits, as part of fixed pay
controls.control_description:
Composition of Fixed Pay: An NBFC may treat all the fixed items of
compensation, including the perquisites and contributions towards
superannuation / retiral benefits, as part of fixed pay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to treat all the fixed items of compensation, including the perquisites and contributions towards superannuation / retiral benefits, as part of fixed pay

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be included in the fixed pay so long as there are monetary ceilings on these reimbursements
controls.control_description:
All perquisites that are
reimbursable may also be included in the fixed pay so long as there are monetary
ceilings on these reimbursements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be included in the fixed pay so long as there are monetary ceilings on these reimbursements

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be part of fixed pay
controls.control_description:
Monetary equivalent of benefits of non-
monetary nature (such as free furnished house, use of company car, etc.) may
also be part of fixed pay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be part of fixed pay

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the following principles for variable pay of its kmp and senior management: (1) composition of variable pay: the variable pay may be in the
controls.control_description:
Principles for Variable Pay: An NBFC may adhere to the following principles for
variable pay of its KMP and senior management:
(1) Composition of Variable Pay: The variable pay may be in the form of
share-linked instruments, or a mix of cash and share-linked instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the following principles for variable pay of its kmp and senior management: (1) composition of variable pay: the variable pay may be in the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that the share-linked instruments are in conformity with relevant statutory provisions
controls.control_description:
It
shall be ensured that the share-linked instruments are in conformity with
relevant statutory provisions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that the share-linked instruments are in conformity with relevant statutory provisions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be proper balance between the cash and share-linked instruments in the variable pay
controls.control_description:
There shall
be proper balance between the cash and share-linked instruments in the
variable pay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be proper balance between the cash and share-linked instruments in the variable pay

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reduced to zero based on performance at an individual, business-unit and company-wide level
controls.control_description:
The variable pay should be truly and effectively variable such
that it may be reduced to zero based on performance at an individual,
business-unit and company-wide level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reduced to zero based on performance at an individual, business-unit and company-wide level

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly defined at the beginning of the performance measurement period to ensure that the employees are well aware of the incentive mechanism
controls.control_description:
In order to do so, performance
measures and their relation to remuneration packages shall be clearly
defined at the beginning of the performance measurement period to ensure
that the employees are well aware of the incentive mechanism.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly defined at the beginning of the performance measurement period to ensure that the employees are well aware of the incentive mechanism

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid immediately
controls.control_description:
<image>
(3) Deferral of variable pay: Not all the variable pay awarded after
performance assessment may be paid immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deferred to time horizon of the risks
controls.control_description:
Certain portion of
variable pay, as decided by the Board of the NBFC, may be deferred to time
horizon of the risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deferred to time horizon of the risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made applicable for both cash and non-cash components of the variable pay
controls.control_description:
The portion of deferral arrangement may be made
applicable for both cash and non-cash components of the variable pay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made applicable for both cash and non-cash components of the variable pay

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided by the board of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
Deferral period for such an arrangement shall be decided by the Board of
the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be decided by the board of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be compensated in a manner that is independent of the business areas they oversee and commensurate with their key role in the nbfc
controls.control_description:
(4) Control and assurance function personnel: KMP and senior
management engaged in financial control, risk management, compliance
and internal audit may be compensated in a manner that is independent of
the business areas they oversee and commensurate with their key role in
the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be compensated in a manner that is independent of the business areas they oversee and commensurate with their key role in the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have higher proportion of fixed compensation
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, such personnel may have higher proportion of fixed
compensation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have higher proportion of fixed compensation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in the form of variable pay, so that exercising the options of malus and / or clawback
controls.control_description:
However, a reasonable proportion of compensation may be
in the form of variable pay, so that exercising the options of malus and / or
clawback, when warranted, is not rendered infructuous.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in the form of variable pay, so that exercising the options of malus and / or clawback

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay guaranteed bonus to kmp and senior management
controls.control_description:
Guaranteed bonus: An NBFC may not pay guaranteed bonus to KMP and senior
management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay guaranteed bonus to kmp and senior management

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered
controls.control_description:
However, in the context of new hiring, joining / sign-on bonus may
be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure neither be considered part of the fixed pay nor of variable pay
controls.control_description:
Such bonus shall neither be considered part of the fixed pay nor
of variable pay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to neither be considered part of the fixed pay nor of variable pay

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to malus and / or clawback arrangements in the event of subdued or negative financial performance of the nbfc and / or the relevant line of
controls.control_description:
Malus / Clawback: The deferred compensation to KMP and senior management
of an NBFC may be subject to malus and / or clawback arrangements in the event
of subdued or negative financial performance of the NBFC and / or the relevant
line of business or employee misconduct in any year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to malus and / or clawback arrangements in the event of subdued or negative financial performance of the nbfc and / or the relevant line of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identified by the nbfc, which require them to invoke the malus and clawback clauses that may be applicable on entire variable pay
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, a
representative set of situations may be identified by the NBFC, which require them
to invoke the malus and clawback clauses that may be applicable on entire
variable pay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identified by the nbfc, which require them to invoke the malus and clawback clauses that may be applicable on entire variable pay

controls.control_objective: To ensure also specify a period during which malus and / or clawback can be applied, covering at least the deferral and retention periods
controls.control_description:
While setting criteria for the application of malus and clawback, the
NBFC may also specify a period during which malus and / or clawback can be
applied, covering at least the deferral and retention periods.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also specify a period during which malus and / or clawback can be applied, covering at least the deferral and retention periods

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a whistle blower mechanism for its directors and employees to report genuine concerns
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall formulate a whistle blower mechanism for its directors and
employees to report genuine concerns.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to formulate a whistle blower mechanism for its directors and employees to report genuine concerns

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure good corporate governance practices in the subsidiaries of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
The Board of an NBFC shall ensure good corporate governance practices in the
subsidiaries of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure good corporate governance practices in the subsidiaries of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame internal guidelines on corporate governance with the approval of its board of directors, enhancing the scope of these directions but without sacrificing the spirit underlying the provisions of this chapter and it shall be published on the company's website
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall frame internal guidelines on corporate governance with the
approval of its Board of Directors, enhancing the scope of these Directions but
without sacrificing the spirit underlying the provisions of this Chapter and it shall
be published on the company's website, if any, for the information of various
stakeholders.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame internal guidelines on corporate governance with the approval of its board of directors, enhancing the scope of these directions but without sacrificing the spirit underlying the provisions of this chapter and it shall be published on the company's website

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its board members are competent to manage its affairs
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall ensure that its Board members are competent to manage its
affairs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its board members are competent to manage its affairs

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure mix of educational qualification and experience within the board
controls.control_description:
Hence, the composition of the Board shall ensure mix of educational
qualification and experience within the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure mix of educational qualification and experience within the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a prerequisite, depending on the type of business pursued by the nbfc
controls.control_description:
Specific expertise of Board
members shall be a prerequisite, depending on the type of business pursued by
the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a prerequisite, depending on the type of business pursued by the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to report to the supervisors in case any independent director is removed / resigns before completion of his normal tenure
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall be required to report to the supervisors in case any Independent
Director is removed / resigns before completion of his normal tenure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be required to report to the supervisors in case any independent director is removed / resigns before completion of his normal tenure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mandatorily listed within three years of its identification by rbi in the upper layer
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-UL shall be mandatorily listed within three years of its identification by
RBI in the Upper Layer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mandatorily listed within three years of its identification by rbi in the upper layer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place on the same lines as applicable to a listed company even before the actual listing, as per the board-approved policy of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
Disclosure requirements shall be put in place on the same
lines as applicable to a listed company even before the actual listing, as per the
Board-approved policy of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be put in place on the same lines as applicable to a listed company even before the actual listing, as per the board-approved policy of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc-ul which are fully owned and controlled by government
controls.control_description:
1[Provided that these provisions shall not be applicable to NBFC-UL which are fully owned and controlled by Government.]
1 Inserted vide Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated June 24, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfc-ul which are fully owned and controlled by government

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue
to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments
granted under these repealed Directions / instructions / guidelines shall be
deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications
<image>
in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure from accepting deposits/ prosecuted by the reserve bank <image> 18
controls.control_description:
Name/s of the NBFCs, if any, with which the person is associated as Promoter, Managing Director, Chairman or Director, including a Residuary Non- Banking Financial Company, which has been prohibited from accepting deposits/ prosecuted by the Reserve Bank
<image>
18.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to from accepting deposits/ prosecuted by the reserve bank <image> 18

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted in respect of each of the proposed directors <image>
controls.control_description:
Whether number of directorships held by the person exceeds the limits prescribed under section 165 of the Companies Act, 2013
Signature:
Date:
Name:
Place:
Designation:
Company Seal:
* For foreign directors Note: Separate form shall be submitted in respect of each of the proposed directors
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted in respect of each of the proposed directors <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure be necessary for a candidate to mention in the column about orders and findings made by the regulators which have been later on reversed/set aside in
controls.control_description:
(Though it shall not be necessary for
a candidate to mention in the column
about orders and findings made by
the regulators which have been later
on reversed/set aside in to, it would
be necessary to make a mention of
the same, in case the reversal/setting
aside is on technical reasons like
limitation or lack of Jurisdiction, etc.,
and not on merit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be necessary for a candidate to mention in the column about orders and findings made by the regulators which have been later on reversed/set aside in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned
controls.control_description:
If the order of the
regulator is temporarily stayed and
the appellate/court proceedings are
pending, the same also should be
mentioned.)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose to the board the nature of his/her interest, direct or indirect
controls.control_description:
(a) The Director shall disclose to the Board the nature of his/her interest, direct or
indirect, if he/she has any interest in or is concerned with a contract or arrangement
or any proposed contract or arrangement entered into or to be entered into between
the NBFC and any other person, immediately upon becoming aware of the same
or at meeting of the Board at which the question of entering into such contract or
arrangement is taken into consideration or if the director was not at the date of that
meeting concerned or interested in such proposed contract or arrangement, then
at the first meeting of the Board held after he/she becomes so concerned or
interested and in case of any other contract or arrangement, the required disclosure
shall be made at the first meeting of the Board held after the director becomes
<image>
concerned or interested in the contract or arrangement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose to the board the nature of his/her interest, direct or indirect

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose by general notice to the board his/her other directorships, his/her memberships of bodies corporate, his/her interest in other entities and h
controls.control_description:
(b) The Director shall disclose by general notice to the Board his/her other
directorships, his/her memberships of bodies corporate, his/her interest in other
entities and his/her interest as a partner or proprietor of firms and shall keep the
Board apprised of all changes therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose by general notice to the board his/her other directorships, his/her memberships of bodies corporate, his/her interest in other entities and h

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide to the nbfc a list of his/her relatives as defined in the companies act, 1956 or 2013 and to the extent the director is aware of directorships
controls.control_description:
(c) The Director shall provide to the NBFC a list of his/her relatives as defined in the
Companies Act, 1956 or 2013 and to the extent the director is aware of
directorships and interests of such relatives in other bodies corporate, firms and
other entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide to the nbfc a list of his/her relatives as defined in the companies act, 1956 or 2013 and to the extent the director is aware of directorships

controls.control_objective: To ensure in carrying on his/her duties as director of the nbfc:
controls.control_description: (d) The Director shall in carrying on his/her duties as director of the NBFC:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in carrying on his/her duties as director of the nbfc:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reasonable to expect from a person with his/her knowledge or experience
controls.control_description:
(i) use such degree of skill as may be reasonable to expect from a person with
his/her knowledge or experience;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reasonable to expect from a person with his/her knowledge or experience

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep himself/herself informed about the business, activities and financial status of the nbfc to the extent disclosed to him/her
controls.control_description:
(iii) shall keep himself/herself informed about the business, activities and
financial status of the NBFC to the extent disclosed to him/her;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep himself/herself informed about the business, activities and financial status of the nbfc to the extent disclosed to him/her

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek to influence any decision of the board for any consideration other than in the interests of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
(v) shall not seek to influence any decision of the Board for any consideration
other than in the interests of the NBFC;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek to influence any decision of the board for any consideration other than in the interests of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure bring independent judgment to bear on all matters affecting the nbfc brought before the board including but not limited to statutory compliances, perf
controls.control_description:
(vi) shall bring independent judgment to bear on all matters affecting the NBFC
brought before the Board including but not limited to statutory compliances,
performance reviews, compliances with internal control systems and
procedures, key executive appointments and standards of conduct;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bring independent judgment to bear on all matters affecting the nbfc brought before the board including but not limited to statutory compliances, perf

controls.control_objective: To ensure in exercise of his/her judgement in matters brought before the board or entrusted to him/her by the board be free from any business or other relations
controls.control_description:
(vii) shall in exercise of his/her judgement in matters brought before the Board or
entrusted to him/her by the Board be free from any business or other
relationship which could materially interfere with the exercise of his/her
independent judgement;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in exercise of his/her judgement in matters brought before the board or entrusted to him/her by the board be free from any business or other relations

controls.control_objective: To ensure express his/her views and opinions at board meetings without any fear <image> or favour and without any influence on exercise of his/her independent j
controls.control_description:
(viii) shall express his/her views and opinions at Board meetings without any fear
<image>
or favour and without any influence on exercise of his/her independent
judgement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to express his/her views and opinions at board meetings without any fear <image> or favour and without any influence on exercise of his/her independent j

controls.control_objective: To ensure forthwith disclose his/her concerns to the board
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to forthwith disclose his/her concerns to the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the information disclosed to him/her by the nbfc in his/her capacity as director of the nbfc only for the purposes of performance of his/her dutie
controls.control_description:
(iii) not make improper use of information disclosed to him/her as a member of
the Board for his/her or someone else's advantage or benefit and shall use
the information disclosed to him/her by the NBFC in his/her capacity as
director of the NBFC only for the purposes of performance of his/her duties
as a director and not for any other purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the information disclosed to him/her by the nbfc in his/her capacity as director of the nbfc only for the purposes of performance of his/her dutie

controls.control_objective: To ensure apprise the director about:
controls.control_description: (a) the NBFC shall apprise the Director about:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apprise the director about:

controls.control_objective: To ensure participate because of his/her interest, direct or indirect therein
controls.control_description:
(iii) voting rights at Board meetings including matters in which Director should not
participate because of his/her interest, direct or indirect therein;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to participate because of his/her interest, direct or indirect therein

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for all statutory and legal compliance
controls.control_description:
and appoint the
compliance officer who shall be responsible for all statutory and legal
compliance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for all statutory and legal compliance

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose and provide to the board including the director all information which is reasonably required for them to carry out their functions and duties
controls.control_description:
(b) the NBFC shall disclose and provide to the Board including the Director all
information which is reasonably required for them to carry out their functions and
duties as a Director of the NBFC and to take informed decisions in respect of
matters brought before the Board for its consideration or entrusted to the director
by the Board or any committee thereof;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose and provide to the board including the director all information which is reasonably required for them to carry out their functions and duties

controls.control_objective: To ensure include but not be limited to the following:
controls.control_description:
(c) the disclosures to be made by the NBFC to the directors shall include but not be
limited to the following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include but not be limited to the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure communicate outcome of board deliberations to directors and concerned personnel and prepare and circulate minutes of the meeting of board to directors
controls.control_description:
(d) the NBFC shall communicate outcome of Board deliberations to directors and
concerned personnel and prepare and circulate minutes of the meeting of Board to
directors in a timely manner and to the extent possible within two business days of
the date of conclusion of the Board meeting;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to communicate outcome of board deliberations to directors and concerned personnel and prepare and circulate minutes of the meeting of board to directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide to the director periodic reports on the functioning of internal control system including effectiveness thereof
controls.control_description:
The NBFC shall provide to the Director periodic reports on the functioning of
internal control system including effectiveness thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide to the director periodic reports on the functioning of internal control system including effectiveness thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint a compliance officer who shall be a senior executive reporting to the board and be responsible for setting forth policies and procedures and s
controls.control_description:
The NBFC shall appoint a compliance officer who shall be a senior executive
reporting to the Board and be responsible for setting forth policies and procedures
and shall monitor adherence to the applicable laws and regulations and policies
and procedures including but not limited to directions of the Reserve Bank and
other concerned statutory and Governmental authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint a compliance officer who shall be a senior executive reporting to the board and be responsible for setting forth policies and procedures and s

controls.control_objective: To ensure assign, transfer, sublet or encumber his/her office and his/her rights and obligations as director of the nbfc to any third party provided that nothin
controls.control_description:
The Director shall not assign, transfer, sublet or encumber his/her office and his/her
rights and obligations as director of the NBFC to any third party provided that
nothing herein contained shall be construed to prohibit delegation of any authority,
power, function or delegation by the Board or any committee thereof subject to
applicable laws and regulations including Memorandum and Articles of Association
of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assign, transfer, sublet or encumber his/her office and his/her rights and obligations as director of the nbfc to any third party provided that nothin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be a waiver thereof nor shall it operate as a bar to the performance, observance, discharge or compliance thereof at any time or times th
controls.control_description:
The failure on the part of either party hereto to perform, discharge, observe or
comply with any obligation or duty shall not be deemed to be a waiver thereof nor
shall it operate as a bar to the performance, observance, discharge or compliance
thereof at any time or times thereafter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be a waiver thereof nor shall it operate as a bar to the performance, observance, discharge or compliance thereof at any time or times th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valid and effectual, only if in writing and signed by the director and the duly authorised representative of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
Any and all amendments and/or supplements and/or alterations to this Deed of
Covenants shall be valid and effectual, only if in writing and signed by the director
and the duly authorised representative of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valid and effectual, only if in writing and signed by the director and the duly authorised representative of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be originals
controls.control_description:
This Deed of Covenants has been executed in duplicate and both the copies shall
be deemed to be originals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be originals
